headline: How The Synchrony Financial (SYF) Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Policy Risks
summary: Synchrony Financial’s modelled fair value has shifted from US$88.22 to US$90.26, putting the updated price target into the same general area as several recent analyst targets in the US$90 to US$101 range. That adjustment sits against a split analyst backdrop, where more constructive voices emphasize consumer resiliency and loan growth potential, while cautious calls focus on sector volatility and policy risk, including proposals to cap credit card interest rates. As you read on, you will see...
